speaker: Amina Rahman
quote: Those hit first and worst by climate change often contributed the least to the problem.

speaker: Dr. Luis Ortega
quote: Warming trends are not abstractions—they show up as heatwaves, droughts, and floods in people's lives.

speaker: Kai Johnson
quote: When we speak up together, city halls listen.

speaker: Marta Silva
quote: Clean air is a health policy and a climate policy at the same time.

speaker: Ravi Narayan
quote: Every rooftop we electrify is a bill lowered and a ton of carbon avoided.
